problem id: 14a72508
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  11000011 -> 00010011
  00000011 -> 01110010
  00111110 -> 00011000
  11001100 -> 10101001
  01111110 -> 00111000
  00000010 -> 11110110
  10110011 -> 11101011
  01111000 -> 00100011
  11111010 -> 01101011
  00111101 -> 10010101

query: 01000010
predicted answer: 11010110
